options.name: -averageWindow
options.description: The size of windows for Insert cell is average of Core box

options.name: -box
options.description: Insert/Check physical cell's bounding box in <llx> <lly> <urx> <ury>

options.name: -genTemplateOnly
options.description: Generate template file to guide how to define spec file for DTCD, ICOVL and LinerCell.

options.name: -inputFile
options.description: Specify the spec file for physical cells.

options.name: -insertRowAreaBoundary
options.description: Specify to insert LinerCell around row area boundary.

options.name: -minimalNumberOfTCD
options.description: the minimal number of DTCD need be inserted. If current windows size definition(WinSizeX and WinSizeY) cannot fit this requirement. we will shrink window size automatically.

options.name: -verifyOnly
options.description: Only verify the Insert physical cells, do not insert cells

options.name: -verifyWindow
options.description: The size of window for verify the Insert physical cells

options.name: -xStep
options.description: The moving x step of verify window

options.name: -yStep
options.description: The moving y step of verify window
